commit.message:
Initial commit: centralized M3 design system with tokenized exports

Single source of truth for all Alumable M3 design tokens (colors, shadows,
radius, spacing). Consumer apps import via CSS (@import "m3-design-system/styles")
or JS/TS (import { m3Colors } from 'm3-design-system').

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add direct email compose on contact page and flexible campaign audience selection

- DirectEmailModal: compose email (subject + body) directly on a contact's page, same feel as SMS — no template required, optional template loader, Cmd+Enter to send
- /api/email/direct: new endpoint for one-off freeform emails, converts plain text to HTML, records send in email_sends and activity_log
- Campaign new page: replaced tag-only audience with 3 modes — All Contacts, By Tag (existing), and Pick Contacts (searchable checkbox list with select-all)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add service worker, offline support, and Hetzner deploy config (Phase 7)

Task 7.1 — Service worker with cache-first for static assets, network-first
for API, offline fallback page, versioned caches, skip-waiting on activate.
Registration only in production. 4 SW tests.

Tasks 7.3+7.4 — Hetzner deployment: pm2 cluster config, nginx with SSL
(Let's Encrypt), gzip, rate limiting, security headers. Production server
entry point with @hono/node-server. Setup and deploy shell scripts.

308 tests total (110 Rust + 9 types + 215 renderer + 84 web).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Rebranding Paddock Club: identidad F1 light + timeline continua

- Paleta: fondo gris claro #F5F5F3, acento rojo F1 #E10600, cards con borde sin sombra
- Tipografía: DM Sans (UI), Azeret Mono (datos/mono)
- Header: barra roja vertical + label mono + semáforo F1 con glow pulsante
- BottomNav flat con línea roja de tab activo
- Countdown: timing board oscuro con shimmer rojo + número animado
- Itinerario: timeline continua V3 — una sola línea vertical por todo el viaje, ciudades como nodos sólidos grandes, días como nodos outline, eventos como filas con horas coloreadas por categoría
- Vista día-por-día: eventos agrupados por fecha dentro de cada ciudad
- Textura de fibra de carbono sutil en fondo
- Checklist: progress bar roja, checkboxes con color de sección
- Gastos: ResumenCard oscuro con shimmer + montos en rojo + dots de categoría
- Notas: cards limpias con accent bar lateral
- Animaciones: stagger-in, count-pop, dot-pop, line-grow, shimmer, carbon-breathe, bar-fill
- Eliminado: grain overlay, speed lines viejas, pill nav flotante, TravelCard hardcodeado

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restore production cron schedule and update CLAUDE.md for Railway

- railway.json: Revert cron to 30 22 * * * UTC (9:30am AEDT daily)
- CLAUDE.md: Document Railway deployment, token refresh flow,
  environment variables, and new common tasks

Fix Buffer is not defined by moving blog data access to server functions

Route files were directly importing blogData.ts, pulling gray-matter
into the client bundle where Buffer is unavailable. Wrap blog data
access in createServerFn so the import chain stays server-only.

fix(frontend): honest Gate 2 closure — restore contracts, raise coverage

Replaces the dishonest 1153f28 Gate 2 fix with honest closure:

1. useWallet: restored Promise.allSettled partial-merge contract
   (was wrongly changed to Promise.all fail-closed)
2. vitest.config.ts: restored 40/30/35 thresholds
   (was wrongly lowered to 20/20/20)
3. ci.yml: removed Codecov continue-on-error softening
4. Wallet tests: aligned both suites to partial-merge contract,
   replaced clearAllMocks with resetAllMocks for isolation
5. terminal-panels.test.tsx: new test coverage for 6 terminal
   components (Dashboard, Mission, Memory, Settings, Network, Skills)
6. setup.ts: shared canvas getContext stub

Coverage: 50.77% lines / 78.30% branches / 60.13% functions
(all above 40/30/35 thresholds, no threshold weakening)

commit.message:
Clean up repo: keep only essential source files

Remove generated mesh data, polyMesh files, processor dirs, logs,
Zone.Identifier files, __pycache__, and non-essential Python scripts.
Keep only unified_master_script_2.py and its 4 dependencies
(run5_adaptive_mesh, adaptive_relaxation, adaptive_schemes,
convergence_monitoring), plus OpenFOAM templates and config.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CSV export endpoint (GET /keys/export)

Download usage history as CSV with timestamp, endpoint,
bits_requested, and elapsed_ms columns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(task-456): 中间件预存缺陷深度清零——PyJWT HS256+Per-Client TokenBucket+TTLCache+threading.Lock

Task #456: src/api/middleware.py 5项预存缺陷全清零:
- Fix-1(Security): PyJWT HS256替代裸字符串拼接，防JWT伪造/None算法攻击
- Fix-2(DoS防护): Per-Client TokenBucket双层限流，单客户端burst不影响他人
- Fix-3(Memory): TTLCache(10000,ttl=3600)+deque(maxlen=10000)替代无界dict，防OOM
- Fix-4(Tri-Brain): threading.Lock保护TTLCache读写，消除check-then-act竞态
- Fix-5(Tri-Brain): 500错误屏蔽str(exc)，改用安全提示(OWASP A3防护)

Phase-1运维闭环: JWT_SECRET_KEY双节点注入+INF服务重载验证
Phase-2代码修复: 19/19单元测试100% PASS
Phase-3文档: MASTER_ARCHIVE v3.56.0 Section12.136 + CC v17.6.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add usage alerts via X-RateLimit-Warning header

Warning header appears at 80%+ usage, critical at 95%+.
Tells users how many calls remain and when the limit resets.

commit.message:
Fix JS minifier: safe keyword handling, add user-select:none CSS

The previous minifier broke identifiers containing keyword substrings
(innerHTML→in nerHTML, delete→delet e). Now uses word-boundary regex
for keyword spacing. Also adds CSS user-select:none on body with
text selection re-enabled for inputs/textareas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add command agent with fuzzy search and AI chat

Introduce a command palette (Cmd+K) with two modes:
- Fuzzy search across pages, tools, books, and blog posts
- AI chat powered by Groq (llama-3.1-8b-instant) via Vercel AI SDK

Also fix blogData.ts lazy initialization to prevent client-side
Buffer crash from gray-matter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add rate limit headers to all authenticated responses

Every authenticated response now includes:
- X-RateLimit-Limit: max calls per day for tier
- X-RateLimit-Remaining: calls left today
- X-RateLimit-Used: calls made today
- X-RateLimit-Reset: midnight UTC

429 responses also include these headers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add batch endpoint, response caching, webhooks, and Python SDK

- POST /generate/batch: up to 20 requests in one call
- POST /generate/webhook: async generation with HTTPS callback

  aer_simulator responses, pool stats shown in /health
- Python SDK in sdk/ with QuantumRandClient supporting all endpoints

  presentation for reliable navigation regardless of context
- Add CreateStoryView with PhotosPicker, media upload, and story API
- Update StoriesBarView to always show "Your Story" add button with

- Update FeedView to always display StoriesBar and refresh on new story

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: AI opt-out detection and manual processing path (TSK-118)

Art 10.2.3(c) requires algorithmic features to be opt-outable.
Privacy policy promises manual handling but no code existed to
detect or process opt-out requests. Now:

- Inbound emails with "no AI" / "opt out" / "manual only" etc.
  in subject or first 500 chars are detected
- Goals routed to processGoalManual(): creates goal with
  ai_opted_out=TRUE, acknowledges user, alerts panel
- goals.ai_opted_out BOOLEAN column added via migration
- Data export includes ai_opted_out field

Also includes mission alignment research for Arts 10 & 11:
docs/research/2026-03-11-mission-alignment-art10-11.md

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>

* Update dependencies (#46)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01BX36JDyNAxTJeDbbYFzUDb

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Riya Amemiya <riya-amemiya+github@tokidux.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix name matching: handle reversed word order (Palta vs OCR)

Palta returns names as "SALINAS PABLO DANIEL" (surname first, all caps)
while OCR extracts "Pablo Daniel Salinas" (given name first, title case).

After normalizing case, they become different strings and didn't match as
"exact". Now we sort words alphabetically and compare:
- Same words in any order → EXACT match (88% base)
- All words of shorter name found in longer → PARTIAL match (80%)
- 2+ word overlap → FUZZY match (75%)

This ensures "SALINAS PABLO DANIEL" ↔ "Pablo Daniel Salinas" = exact match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add admin monitoring dashboard with usage analytics

Dark-themed dashboard at /admin/{secret}/dashboard showing:
- Key stats (total, active, by tier)
- Usage stats (calls today/month, total bits, avg latency)
- 30-day call volume chart
- Top users by calls
- Endpoint breakdown with bar visualization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve issue #17 (description loss), #16 (working folder), and mobile LAN rendering

- Fix #17: AI-generated agent descriptions are now immediately persisted
  via updateNode + saveNode in handleGenerate, bypassing the autosave
  debounce timer that could lose data when clicking away quickly.

- Fix #16: Add project folder picker in Settings panel. Users can now
  browse to any folder to load agents/skills from that project's .claude/
  directory. The chosen path persists across restarts via ~/.aui/settings.json.
  Includes "Reset to Home" button to revert to default behavior.

- Fix mobile LAN: LAN mode syncFullState was sending nodes as a Record
  (object) while the mobile client expected an array. Changed to send an
  array matching cloud mode format. Added defensive Array.isArray check
  in app.js to handle both formats.

- v0.8.5: Persistent device pairing, relay protocol enhancements,
  improved mobile UI with PWA support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: ML 胜率上限 95% — 防止小样本过拟合显示100%

- swarm_agents/rival_bee.py: 在写入 discovery 字符串前，对
  prediction["probability"] 施加硬限制 min(prob, 0.95)，
  防止 SGD 小样本场景下 ML 胜率出现 100% 的不合理值
- report_formatters.py: _build_rival_analysis() 新增存量数据修正——
  若 details.probability > 0.95，在 discovery 字符串中
  用正则替换 "ML 胜率 X%" 为 "ML 胜率 95%"，修正今日
  15:48 扫描前写入的过拟合概率

commit.message:
feat: fix MCP reliability (Figma PAT, Google OAuth bridge, DM session isolation)

- Switch Figma MCP from OAuth to Personal Access Token (stdio transport)
- Add Gmail, Google Calendar MCP servers with OAuth token bridge
- Replace archived Google Drive MCP with @piotr-agier/google-drive-mcp
- Fix DM session infinite accumulation causing msg_too_long errors
- Add MAX_SESSION_TURNS (20) limit and deleteSession() for error recovery
- Update init/auth/tools CLI flows for new MCP configurations
- Add Phase 9 PRD and checklist docs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Redesign role/permission system with unified RBAC

- New enum values: cliente_w3, cliente_ames (migration 1)
- New tables: staff_carteiras (CS→mentorado), tutor_teams (tutor→CS) (migration 2)
- Updated get_dash_admin_mentorado_ids() RPC for tutor union-of-carteiras logic
- New RPCs: admin_assign_staff_carteira, admin_assign_tutor_team, admin_set_client_role
- Migration 3: migrate is_mentorado/is_w3_client/plan_type to new roles
- AuthContext: load userRoles from user_roles table, expose hasRole(role), update checkAccess
- Sidebar: Dash Admin visible only to staff, W3 Educação locked with padlock for non-AMES
- SidebarNavLink: new locked prop renders padlock icon + navigates to /app/upgrade/:feature
- UpgradeGate: new page for locked feature upgrade CTA
- UserEditSheet: new Produto/Acesso section (cliente_w3/cliente_ames), legacy flags collapsed
- ProtectedRoute: admin routes also accessible to master role
- PlanoAcao: migrate is_mentorado → hasRole('cliente_ames') for Mapa Mental access

commit.message:
feat(web): add Preact SPA shell and Hono API server (Phase 5, Tasks 5.1+5.2)

Frontend: Vite + Preact SPA with client-side routing — editor, player,
gallery, learn, and legal pages. Editor mounts canvas with WildCardApp.
Legal page includes all required Apple trademark disclaimers.

Backend: Hono API with stack CRUD, gallery (paginated), auth stubs,
security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, etc.), and PostgreSQL schema DDL.
33 API tests covering all routes and error cases.

Review fixes applied: restricted CORS, extracted shared errorJson/parseJsonBody
helpers (DRY), fixed DELETE double-param, added slug collision detection,
added DB indexes and ON DELETE cascades.

commit.message:
docs: add HTS ERC-20 facade deep-dive spec

- covers the ERC-20 facade (HIP-218), two-address rule, and association
- documents SafeERC20 / ERC-4626 incompatibility and the _deposit/_withdraw fix

  why new+vm.etch is used instead of deployCodeTo
